name: uap-pulse
description: MCP server over 350 official-government UAP/UFO records: all four U.S. Pentagon PURSUE releases plus curated archives from 12 nations, with an interactive 3D map.
data_license: U.S. PURSUE records: public domain (17 U.S.C. 105); international source rights may vary

tools.name: search_sightings
tools.description: Search records by PURSUE release, free text, agency, file type, year range, or location.

tools.name: search_nearby
tools.description: Incidents within a radius (km) of a latitude/longitude, sorted by distance.

tools.name: get_sighting
tools.description: Full record for one file id, including the war.gov source link.

tools.name: full_text_search
tools.description: Relevance-ranked substring search across all descriptions, titles and locations.

tools.name: notable_cases
tools.description: Curated, historically significant cases with context.

tools.name: hotspots
tools.description: Locations ranked by number of declassified records.

tools.name: stats
tools.description: Totals and breakdowns by release, agency, file type, and era.

tools.name: timeline
tools.description: Record counts per decade or year.

tools.name: timeline_data
tools.description: Per-period records with coordinates for animated timelines.

agencies: Office of the Director of National Intelligence
dataset.source: war.gov PURSUE Releases 1–4 (2026-05-08 through 2026-07-10) + 12 national archives
